narrative: US-Iran conflict and Strait of Hormuz closure risks introduce a geopolitical risk premium as crude surges toward $107 — gold lower -2.05%; equities +0.29%; DXY +0.30%; VIX 18.8. EUR/USD retreats to 1.1705 as ECB's Kazimir signals a June hike is inevitable, though a +175bp Fed-ECB carry advantage continues to anchor the pair. AUD/USD pulls back to 0.7183 on broader risk-off sentiment despite an extreme 89% retail short bias. Watch the RBA Rate Decision at 04:30 UTC tomorrow.
